validation_velocity.validation_model: 10 custdev interviews + 2 pilot asks + 1 partner-route validation
validation_velocity.binary_pass_signal: At least 2 qualified institutions agree to a paid or structured pilot conversation within the test window.
validation_velocity.binary_kill_signal: No qualified institution accepts a pilot conversation and no credible route partner agrees to explore delivery.
validation_velocity.derivation_basis: protocol-derived from buyer motion, approval-route complexity, and current evidence gaps
validation_velocity.notes: Values remain provisional until outreach and route assumptions are revalidated.

demand_pull.derivation_basis: only source-backed category structure and current product format are available; SEMrush not collected yet
demand_pull.notes: No SEMrush collection or competitor price census completed yet.

regulatory_context.derivation_basis: derived from verified mandate/accreditation requirements and contradiction severity
regulatory_context.notes: Must be derived from the evidence-first card and contradiction log, not guessed.

collapsed_scores.confidence_reason: SEMrush and real-world validation data not collected yet.
